title: potentilla commutata
intro: Potentilla commutata, also known as Silver Buffaloberry, is a shrub native to the western United States and Canada, characterized by its white flowers and silver-gray leaves. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to soothe digestive issues and protect against cell damage. The health benefits of Potentilla commutata include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support immune function. Traditionally, the plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, allowing for various herbal preparations to be used for medicinal purposes.
